    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    C

    Client - Class in Model
    Represents a client with personal and contact details.
    Client() - Constructor for class Model.Client
    Creates an empty client object.
    Client(int, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class Model.Client
    Creates a Client with specified values.
    ClientBLL - Class in BusinessLogic
    Business Logic Layer for handling operations related to Client entities.
    ClientBLL() - Constructor for class BusinessLogic.ClientBLL
    Constructs a new ClientBLL instance and initializes the ClientDAO.
    ClientDAO - Class in Data_Access
    Data Access Object for Client entity
    ClientDAO() - Constructor for class Data_Access.ClientDAO
     
    clientName() - Method in record class Model.Bill
    Returns the value of the clientName record component.
    ClientView - Class in Presentation
    The ClientView class provides a GUI for managing clients.
    ClientView() - Constructor for class Presentation.ClientView
    Constructs the client management window with all GUI components and event listeners.
    close(Connection) - Static method in class Connection.ConnectionFactory
    Closes a Connection object
    close(ResultSet) - Static method in class Connection.ConnectionFactory
    Closes a ResultSet object
    close(Statement) - Static method in class Connection.ConnectionFactory
    Closes a Statement object
    Connection - package Connection
     
    ConnectionFactory - Class in Connection
     
    createBill(Bill) - Method in class BusinessLogic.BillBLL
    Creates a new bill in the database.
    createOrder(int, int, int) - Method in class BusinessLogic.OrderBLL
    Creates a new order, updates stock, and generates a bill.
